title: Enamel Oven Tray, PFAS-Free, 41x27x3.1 cm, Grey, Dishwasher Safe, 230°C Oven Safe
availability_text: Only 13 left in stock (more on the way).
features: GENEROUS DIMENSIONS: Large 41 cm x 27 cm enamel baking tray, perfect for batch cooking and family-sized portions with ample space for multiple dishes.
PREMIUM CONSTRUCTION: Enamel-coated steel design ensures superior heat distribution and lasting durability, resistant to chipping and staining.
PRACTICAL FEATURES: Wide-rimmed design for secure handling with oven gloves, plus PFAS-free surface for easy food release and cleaning.
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for temperatures up to 230°C and dishwasher safe, ideal for roasting, baking, and general cooking tasks.
LASTING QUALITY: Backed by a comprehensive 15-year warranty, this Prochef tray is built for years of reliable kitchen service.
description: Elevate your cooking experience with this spacious 41cm grey enamel oven tray, thoughtfully designed for larger meals and batch cooking. Crafted from enamel-coated steel, this robust tray delivers consistent heat distribution for perfect results every time. The PFAS-free surface ensures effortless food release, while the wide, easy-grip rims provide secure handling, even with oven gloves. Measuring 41cm x 27cm with a 3.1cm depth, it's ideal for everything from crispy roast potatoes to loaded nachos or a full tray of baked chicken. Built to withstand temperatures up to 230°C and dishwasher safe for convenient cleaning, this versatile tray seamlessly combines practicality with durability. The chip-resistant enamel coating maintains its quality through countless uses, and with a 15-year warranty, you can trust in its long-lasting performance for all your family meals and batch cooking needs.
